# Wise HRM – Exclude these when uploading to cPanel (FTP/rsync)
# Use this list so you don’t overwrite server-only or generated files.

# Environment (server has its own .env)
.env
.env.backup
.env.production

# Dependencies (run composer install on server)
vendor/

# Front-end build (not needed if you don’t use npm build)
node_modules/
public/build
public/hot

# Generated / local-only (server creates its own)
storage/wise_hrm_installed.lock
storage/app/owner.enc
storage/*.key
public/storage

# IDE / OS
.idea
.vscode
.fleet
.DS_Store
Thumbs.db

# Optional: keep these if you use Git on server
# .git
